Notes: Initial pseudostate transitions to TransportationMode.
TransportationMode is explicitly modeled.
selectorPressed leaves transportation mode and enters On with deactivation action.
Shutdown holding is represented by several HoldingFrom states rather than one common preparing off state.
Short hold release returns to prior operating states in several cases but not as one general On history transition.
After 5 seconds shows ShutdownMessage and only reaches Off after selectorReleased.
Off state is explicitly modeled.
selectorPressed from Off to On is modeled.
On is modeled as a composite state.
A history-like H is used only inside RecipeExecution rather than as a general On history.
selectorHeld is handled from On substates by transitions to holding states.
bowlRemoved is modeled to cancel shutdown warning and to return from meal ready to home.
On enters Operating and then Home initially.
Home state is explicitly modeled.
Inactivity after 14min30sec leads from Operating including Home to AutoShutdownWarning.
Recipe start after recipe selection enters RecipeExecution with AddIngredients as the initial prompt.
Start requires bowlPlaced which is equivalent to the bowl not being removed.
Entering AddIngredients instructs ingredient addition and weighing.
AutoShutdownWarning represents the final shutdown warning period.
AutoShutdownWarning goes to Off after 30 seconds with powerOff.
Cancel leaves warning to Operating which re-enters Home.
AddIngredients represents prompting the user to add ingredients.
No next self-transition for additional ingredients before chopping is modeled.
The combined weight-correct and more-ingredients guard for repeating ingredient prompts is absent.
Ingredient prompting occurs on AddIngredients entry but not on the expected self-transition.
After correct amount is confirmed selecting next leads to Chopping.
Correct amount is represented but the no-more-ingredients condition is not explicit.
Chopping entry starts chopping with recipe speed and time.
Chopping state is explicitly modeled.
There is no transition from Chopping back to AddIngredients for more ingredients.
No guard combining chopping completion with more ingredients after chopping is modeled.
No ingredient setup action occurs from the chopping completion path.
After choppingDone the model waits for next and then enters Cooking.
Chopping completion is represented but the no-more-ingredients condition is not explicit.
Cooking entry starts cooking with recipe temperature and time.
Cooking state is explicitly modeled.
CookingDone with hasMoreRecipeSteps returns to AddIngredients for further recipe steps.
cookingDone with hasMoreRecipeSteps captures completion of the timed step and need for more ingredients.
Returning to AddIngredients triggers ingredient instructions for the next step.
CookingDone on the last step transitions to MealReady.
isLastRecipeStep is equivalent to no further ingredients or steps required.
MealReady represents the ready-to-serve state.
The Operating inactivity transition also applies while in MealReady.
Extra states add reasonable detail such as selection and shutdown messages.
Extra transitions are reasonable refinements and do not contradict the description.
Extra guards such as bowlPlaced and heldLessThan5sec are appropriate.
Extra actions are descriptive prompts or timer controls consistent with behavior.
Additional composite structure is a reasonable decomposition.
No incorrect additional regions are present.
The extra H usage is intended as a reasonable history-like return mechanism.
